defaultTerms:
1. Advance booking amount is non-refundable.
2. Full payment must be made before checkout.
3. Check-in: 12:00 PM, Check-out: 11:00 AM.
4. Hall booking includes setup and cleanup time.
5. Outside catering is allowed with prior permission.
6. Management is not responsible for loss of valuables.
7. Any damage to property will be charged separately.
